model._hint: Fine-tune: ogkalu/Comic-Diffusion v2 (SD 1.5 base). All 6 comic styles trained simultaneously. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 20–30 steps. 25 is a solid default. | CFG 7–8 recommended. Values above 10 cause oversaturation. | SD 1.5 native 512×512.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates soft storybook-style illustrations in the style of Hollie Mengert — warm palettes, expressive rounded characters, and charming fairy-tale compositions.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'holliemengert artstyle' must appear in every prompt. Examples: 'a fairy sitting on a flower, holliemengert artstyle', 'two children in a magical forest, holliemengert artstyle', 'a cozy cottage in autumn, holliemengert artstyle'.
